events.title: The 2026 Oppenheimer Lecture with Ignacio Cirac: Quantum Simulation in the presence of errors
events.description: A lecture by Ignacio Cirac on quantum simulation and error presence.

events.title: OPT Document Check Workshop
events.description: Join Berkeley International Office as you prepare your OPT application! We will cover the required documents, how to fill out the forms, and common mistakes. There will also be a Q&A portion.

events.title: Cal Blueprint (Bay Area Open Science Group March Meeting)
events.description: This month, members of Cal Blueprint will discuss building pro-bono web and mobile applications for nonprofits.

events.title: Bate-Papo
events.description: An informal conversation gathering, likely for language practice or social interaction.

events.title: Condensed Matter Seminar with Yuan Cao
events.description: Seminar on Forbidden Second-Harmonic Generation in Pristine materials.

events.title: Berkeley Book Chat with Andreja Novakovic
events.description: A book discussion event featuring author Andreja Novakovic.

events.title: Berkeley Book Chat with Shiben Banerji
events.description: A book discussion event featuring author Shiben Banerji.

events.title: Holi Festival
events.description: A celebration of the traditional Holi Festival.

events.title: Archaeological Duty: advancing recovery efforts through the Missing American Aircrew Project (MAAP)
events.description: A discussion on archaeological efforts in the Missing American Aircrew Project (MAAP).

events.title: 2026 Summer Opportunities Fair
events.description: An fair showcasing various summer opportunities for students.

events.title: How to opt out: Lessons from 14 years of evading surveillance capitalism
events.description: A lecture discussing methods and lessons from evading surveillance capitalism over 14 years.

events.title: Lecture: The Interpreter of Desires: Iranian Cinema with Psychoanalysis
events.description: A lecture exploring Iranian cinema through the lens of psychoanalysis.

events.title: Huang Wenjing + Li Hu: To Connect: Radically and Poetically | Architecture Lecture
events.description: An architecture lecture by Huang Wenjing and Li Hu on radical and poetic connections.

events.title: Film Screening – “Occupation Diaries: Three Portraits”
events.description: A screening of the film “Occupation Diaries: Three Portraits”.

events.title: Lunch Poems: Cindy Juyoung Ok
events.description: A poetry reading event featuring Cindy Juyoung Ok.

events.title: Rupture: The U.S. and the Fate of World Order (Talk 2 of 4)
events.description: The second in a four-part talk series on the U.S. and the future of world order.

events.title: Sumud Behind Bars: Palestinian Women and the Politics of Everyday Resistance
events.description: A discussion on Palestinian women and their everyday resistance while incarcerated.

events.title: Book Talk featuring Telle Whitney
events.description: Telle Whitney speaks about her book, Rebooting Tech Culture, in conversation with John Wawrzynek and the Berkeley Society of Women Engineers.

events.title: Luis Flores: Remaking Landed Economic Security in America | City & Regional Planning Lecture
events.description: A City & Regional Planning lecture by Luis Flores on remaking landed economic security.

events.title: Developing Skills for Careers Beyond Academia (Virtual)
events.description: Workshop on developing skills for career paths outside of academia.

events.title: Author Talk with Jeff Chang: “Water Mirror Echo: Bruce Lee and the Making of Asian America”
events.description: An author talk with Jeff Chang discussing his book on Bruce Lee and Asian America.

events.title: Women*'s History & Empowerment Month
events.description: An event celebrating Women's History & Empowerment Month.

events.title: Sonic Socialism: Governing Crisis through Sound in Urban Vietnam
events.description: A presentation on the role of sound in governing crisis in urban Vietnam.

events.title: Julia Keefe Indigenous Big Band
events.description: A performance by the Julia Keefe Indigenous Big Band.

events.title: Conversation: Penny Cooper and Rena Rosenwasser with Margot Norton
events.description: A conversation with Penny Cooper and Rena Rosenwasser, moderated by Margot Norton.

events.title: $5 Day: International Women's Day
events.location: The Lawrence Hall of Science, Berkeley
events.description: Celebrate International Women's Day with $5 admission and special activities.

events.title: The German Blues: A Historian's Perspective on the Rise of Right-Wing Populism in Eastern Germany
events.description: An insightful lecture presented by historian Dorothee Wierling.

events.title: Transfer Student Social
events.description: Calling all transfer students! Enjoy a fun social with refreshments and snacks!

events.title: All Staff Update
events.description: Bi-monthly all-staff meeting to share information and engage in dialogue about Berkeley IT.

events.title: Crafter Dark – Beaded Potted Plant & Live Music
events.description: Stop by CrafterDark and craft your own beaded potted plant and vibe to live music from Cub Concerts at Berkeley.

events.title: Empowering Womxn of Color Conference (EWOCC)
events.description: An impactful in-person event creating a platform for discussions on empowering womxn of color.

events.title: St. Patrick's Day Celebration
events.description: Celebrate St. Patrick's Day at the student union! Enjoy sweet treats, crafts, and much more!

events.title: Mental Health and the Job Search Panel (Virtual)
events.description: A virtual panel discussion on mental health considerations during the job search process.

events.title: Tea with Tracy (Virtual)
events.description: Join CIO Tracy Shinn for a virtual tea or morning beverage.

events.title: Game Night with Board Games at Berkeley
events.description: Join for an evening of fun trying out new games with friends.

events.title: Cultural Analytics series: Talk with Peter Leonard
events.description: A talk on "The Three Obstructions: Improvements in Analysis & Interface for Multimodal Retrieval" as part of the Cultural Analytics series.

events.title: Molecular Foundry Anniversary
events.description: Join the celebration of innovation and discovery at the Molecular Foundry Anniversary.

events.title: Tea with Tracy (On Campus)
events.description: Join CIO Tracy Shinn for an on-campus tea or morning beverage.

events.title: JupyterHub Security Workshop
events.description: A workshop focused on security aspects of JupyterHub.

events.title: Grad Student Appreciation Patio Party
events.description: Bring some friends to our Graduate Student Patio Party. Enjoy tasty bites.

events.title: Graduate Student Patio Party
events.description: Free to all UC Berkeley Graduate students! Enjoy a social gathering.

events.title: OSPO Monthly Knowledge Exchange: April
events.description: A monthly knowledge exchange event organized by the OSPO (Open Source Program Office).

events.title: Crafter Dark – DIY Shirt Patches
events.location: 1st Floor of MLK Jr. Building, Game Zone Area
events.description: Take a break from the books and join us to make your own DIY shirt patches.

events.title: Cultural Analytics series: Talk with Kyle Booten
events.description: A talk on "Writing With and Beyond AI: Fieldnotes from Computer-Mediated Poetry" as part of the Cultural Analytics series.

events.title: Handshake for Graduate Students (Virtual)
events.description: Workshop on how to effectively use Handshake for graduate student career opportunities.

events.title: Movie Night (Legally Blonde)
events.description: Come join us for an enjoyable evening of a screening of Legally Blonde.

events.title: Building Open Connected Scientific Data Products for the Cryosphere hackdays - Day 1
events.description: First day of a multi-day hackathon focused on scientific data products for the cryosphere.

events.description: Second day of a multi-day hackathon focused on scientific data products for the cryosphere.

events.description: Third day of a multi-day hackathon focused on scientific data products for the cryosphere.

events.title: OSPO Monthly Meetup: April
events.description: A monthly meetup organized by the OSPO (Open Source Program Office) for April.

events.title: BITSS Annual Meeting 2026
events.description: Annual meeting of the Berkeley Initiative for Transparency in the Social Sciences.

events.title: Community Day
events.description: Get to know our community service student organizations as they host activities and workshops.

events.title: CRELS speaker series with Simone Zhang
events.description: A speaker series talk on "Scoring Justice: Risk Assessment Tools, Court Practices, and Fairness Perceptions".

events.title: UC Open Source Summit 2026 - Day 1
events.description: First day of the UC Open Source Summit 2026.

events.title: UC Open Source Summit 2026 - Day 2
events.description: Second day of the UC Open Source Summit 2026.

events.title: Networking for Non-Academic Career Exploration and Preparation (Virtual)
events.description: Workshop focusing on networking strategies for non-academic career paths.

events.title: 2026 California Neurotechnology Conference
events.description: A conference to deepen knowledge and ignite collaboration in neurotechnology research.

events.title: MeasureDev 2026: Open Science in the Age of AI: Balancing Privacy and Transparency
events.description: Conference exploring open science, AI, and the balance between privacy and transparency.

events.title: Drag Bingo with Leggy Pee
events.description: An unforgettable night filled with laughter, prizes, and treats hosted by Thee Leggy Pee.

events.title: Destress Fest
events.location: 1st Floor of MLK Jr. Building, Game Zone Area
events.description: Unwind and recharge before exams.

events.title: OSPO Monthly Knowledge Exchange: May
events.description: A monthly knowledge exchange event organized by the OSPO (Open Source Program Office) for May.

events.title: 2026 First Generation End of Year Celebration
events.location: The Inclusive Excellence Hub, 2515 Channing Way Berkeley, CA 94704
events.description: Join first-generation graduate students, faculty, staff, and allies in celebrating the end of the academic year. Dinner provided!

events.title: Research Transparency and Reproducibility Training (RT2) 2026 - Day 1
events.description: First day of a multi-day training on research transparency and reproducibility.

events.description: Workshop to help graduate students plan their summer activities and goals.

events.description: A monthly meetup organized by the OSPO (Open Source Program Office) for May.

events.description: Morning ceremony for undergraduate commencement, celebrating Computer Science, Data Science, or Statistics majors.

events.description: Afternoon ceremony for undergraduate commencement, celebrating Computer Science, Data Science, or Statistics majors.
